content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Sticker Mule: Software engineer Anywhere in the World New York TypeScript and Go Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0018/9370/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.stickermule.com">https://www.stickermule.com</a> </p> <p>Sticker Mule is building the Internet's most lucrative commerce platform by combining software, manufacturing, and AI into one fully integrated stack. No print company, or pure software company for that matter, can match what we're doing. We're privately owned, profitable, and doing 9-figures in annual revenue with no meddlesome investors.</p> <div>&nbsp;</div> <h2><strong>How we work</strong></h2> <ol> <li> <p>Small, autonomous teams that own products end-to-end.</p> </li> <li> <p>Prioritize what matters right now and pivot instantly when needed.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ship across web and mobile from the same codebase. We use Go, TypeScript, React, Expo, GraphQL, Postgres, and run on GCP.</p> </li> <li> <p>Use AI aggressively to push the limit of what we can do.</p> </li> <li> <p>Move fast, build for the masses, and deprioritize edge cases.</p> </li> <li> <p>Fully remote from 40+ countries and collaborate using Asana and Slack.</p> </li> </ol> <div>&nbsp;</div> <h2><strong>Requirements</strong></h2> <ol> <li> <p>You are an exceptional full-stack software engineer.</p> </li> <li> <p>You use AI aggressively and write well in English.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> </li> </ol> <h2><strong>What you will work on</strong></h2> <p>You'll help build and scale&nbsp;<strong>Sticker Mule</strong>&nbsp;<strong>Pro</strong>&nbsp;— a suite of software tools for creators and businesses:</p> <ol> <li> <p>Stores (Shopify alternative)</p> </li> <li> <p>AI tools (internal and customer-facing)</p> </li> <li> <p>Notify (Mailchimp alternative)</p> </li> <li> <p>Reply (Zendesk alternative)</p> </li> <li> <p>Hire Me (Contra alternative)</p> </li> <li> <p>Mobile apps</p> </li> </ol> <div>&nbsp;</div> <h2><strong>Compensation</strong></h2> <ol> <li> <p>Salary: $150,000–$250,000 USD</p> </li> <li> <p>$20,000 signing bonus</p> </li> <li> <p>4 weeks vacation + country-specific holidays</p> </li> <li> <p>Fully remote</p> </li> </ol> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sticker-mule-software-engineer-3">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sticker-mule-software-engineer-3</a></p> Thu, 14 May 2026 09:14:28 +0000 Sat, 13 Motion Graphics Designer Anywhere in the World Lemesos Figma and 3D Animation Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4671/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cyprus or Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://xm.com">https://xm.com</a> </p> <div class="section page-centered"> <div><strong>Turkish-Speaking</strong>&nbsp;<strong>Video &amp; Motion Graphics Designer</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>The Role:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>As a&nbsp;Video and Motion Graphics Designer, you will be responsible for producing professional, creative videos, and motion assets across our product range, marketing communications and social media channels. You will be working on various projects including, but not limited to, 3D illustrations, animations and video ads for campaigns, as well as informational videos like education and news for our web and app platforms. &nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>The main responsibilities of the position include:</h3> <div class="posting-requirements plain-list"> <div> <ul> <li>Develop creative concepts and storyboard ideas for video projects</li> <li>Design and produce engaging video content, including but not limited to promotional videos, video tutorials, video trailers for events by editing, compositing, and adding visual effects</li> <li>Create realistic CGI Visuals (3D + Real Footage)</li> <li>Use 3D Camera Tracking &amp; Match-move techniques</li> <li>Utilize motion graphics techniques to enhance visual storytelling and create engaging animations</li> <li>Keep abreast of the current video trends by incorporating the latest styles, techniques, and narratives into advertising campaigns to ensure content is fresh, relevant, and engaging</li> <li>Perform any other tasks, as assigned by the Regional Marketing Manager</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>Main requirements:</h3> <div class="posting-requirements plain-list"> <div> <ul> <li>Degree in Art or Design, Animation (2D + 3D), Illustration, or a related field</li> <li>At least 3 years of experience in a similar position</li> <li>Expert-level skills in Adobe Creative Suite, Cinema4D + Redshift (Octane)</li> <li>Strong online portfolio demonstrating the skills (only applications accompanied by a relevant work portfolio will be taken into consideration)</li> <li>Understanding of animation principles, typography, and visual storytelling as well as creating and editing video content</li> <li>Ability to work smart - automating repetitive tasks, building motion graphic templates, and developing efficient systems for versioning and delivery</li> <li>Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines efficiently</li> <li>Proactive, efficient, and creative</li> <li>Fluent Turkish speaker with excellent verbal and written communication in English</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>Benefit from:</h3> <div class="posting-requirements plain-list"> <div> <ul> <li>Attractive remuneration package plus performance related reward</li> <li>Intellectually stimulating work environment</li> <li>Continuous personal development and international training opportunities</li> </ul> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="section page-centered"> <div> <h3>The Hiring Experience: What Awaits You</h3> <div class="posting-requirements pl
